commit.message:
feat: implement station search functionality

Station search is now fully functional with type-ahead search, filtering
by name or line, and display of station details.

Components:
- StationSearch: debounced search input with clear button
- SearchResults: displays matching stations with lines, borough, and favorite toggle
- SearchScreen: main screen with search and popular stations

Search logic (stationSearch.ts):
- Search by station name (supports abbreviation expansion like "st" → "street")
- Search by subway line (e.g., "A", "1", "F")
- Complex-aware grouping for multi-entrance stations
- Relevance scoring for result ranking

feat: MM多信号方向共识+dust份额门槛 — 3信号投票替代单一Chainlink判断

MM方向共识 (3信号投票):
1. 市场价格: yes_mid > 0.50 = 看涨
2. Chainlink: current > strike = 看涨 (strike=0时弃权不投票)
3. Binance 30秒趋势: 涨>0.01%=看涨, 跌>0.01%=看跌, 否则弃权
至少2票同意才确认方向, 分歧时不交易

审查修复:
- strike=0时Chainlink弃权(原来默认投涨,造成永久上涨偏向)
- compute_short_trend只调用一次(原来重复调用两次)
- 移除不可达的死代码分支

dust_cleanup改进:
- 新增份额门槛: shares >= 3 的仓位不是灰尘, 不走dust cleanup
- 防止5shares@低价被误当灰尘清理(上次运行3笔共亏$2.85)

commit.message:
feat: Invoice Inbox — auto-process emailed invoices from finance@cholasx.co.uk

New email invoice processing system:
- Monitors finance@cholasx.co.uk via IMAP (imapflow)
- Click "Check Inbox Now" to fetch unread emails with PDF/image attachments
- Each attachment processed by Cholas Allrounder AI:
  * Extracts supplier, invoice number, date, amounts, VAT
  * Checks for duplicate invoices by reference number
  * Matches or creates supplier (fuzzy matching)
  * Creates draft expense transaction in Finance
- Marks processed emails as read (won't process twice)
- Full processing history log with status badges

Workflow: Forward invoice to finance@cholasx.co.uk → Check Inbox →
AI processes → Draft expense in Finance → Review and post

New files:
- backend: invoice-email.service.js + routes.js
- frontend: InvoiceInboxPage.jsx
- Sidebar: "Invoice Inbox" added under Import & Sync
- Dependency: imapflow for IMAP support

Env vars needed: INVOICE_IMAP_HOST, INVOICE_IMAP_PORT,
INVOICE_IMAP_USER, INVOICE_IMAP_PASS

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: `TeamSession.get_messages` return duplicated messages (#7372)

## Summary

- Fixes #7341 — `TeamSession.get_messages(member_ids=...)` returned
duplicate messages when a member run was stored both as a standalone run
and inside `member_responses`, causing OpenAI Responses API 400 errors
(`Duplicate item found with id fc_...`) on subsequent delegation turns
- Deduplicates `filtered_runs` by `run_id` via an `_add_if_unseen`
helper in the `member_ids` filtering logic in
`TeamSession.get_messages()`
- Adds 9 unit tests and 3 integration tests covering the fix

## Details

Member agent runs are stored in two places during a team run:
1. As standalone runs via `session.upsert_run()` (in `_default_tools.py`
/ `_task_tools.py`)
2. Inside the parent team run's `member_responses` via
`run_response.add_member_run()`

This dual storage happens **unconditionally in-memory** during the run —
`store_member_responses` only controls whether `member_responses` are
persisted to the DB. When `_get_history_for_member_agent` calls
`get_messages(member_ids=...)` on subsequent delegation turns, the same
run was collected from both locations, producing duplicate tool call
IDs.

The fix tracks seen `run_id`s during filtering and skips duplicates.
Runs without a `run_id` are still included.

## Type of change

- [x] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Improvement
- [ ] Model update

`./scripts/validate.sh`)

or updated (if applicable)

confirmed that no other PR already addresses this issue

- Real PNL data flows from Altura API into the card

commit.message:
feat: scope-based short name allocation for all identifiers

Extend scope-based naming from bindings to all identifiers including
HIR temporaries and SSA/optimizer-created variables. Each Scope has a
slot counter that produces short names (a, b, ..., z, A, ..., Z, aa,
...). FunctionIR stores an allocateName callback so optimizer passes
can allocate from the function's scope without direct Scope dependency.

Environment.createIdentifier() accepts an optional name parameter and
falls back to environment.allocateName (set by the Pipeline per
function). This ensures all identifiers — bindings, temporaries, phi
nodes, inlined clones — get short names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(sms): refresh config cache before matching in SmsReceiver

SmsReceiver relied entirely on the in-memory cache populated from a
previous UI interaction. After Android kills the app process (battery
optimisation), the cache is empty and matchesSms() always returns false
— no SMS was ever auto-forwarded from a cold start.

Use runBlocking to call refreshIfStale() before the matcher check so
the cache is always populated when an SMS arrives.

English covering: pipeline architecture, crate table, runtime surfaces,
REPL usage with examples, Transparency Triad UI, server configuration,
gossip network, compute backend, full Lojban coverage list, reasoning
engine capabilities (all 22 implemented features), development commands,
and tech stack. Removed stale references (run_bound, todo.md, wac).

fix(sms): use full sms_matchers for auto-forward matching (issue #20)

Root cause: the API now returns sms_matchers (sender+body+match_type)
instead of sms_senders (phone strings only). Body-only SMS configs had
no phone entries, so matchesSender() always returned false — nothing
was ever auto-forwarded.

Changes:
- ApiService: add SmsMatcher data class; replace sms_senders with
  sms_matchers in ConfigResponse
- ConfigCache: SmsConfig.matchers replaces senderPhones; new
  matchesSms(phone, body) checks both sender and body conditions
- SmsReceiver: pass body to matchesSms() instead of matchesSender()
- ConfigsAdapter: display matcher details (sender + body pattern) in
  the configs list instead of "No matcher configured"

Desktop:
- desktop_bring_to_front: robust SetForegroundWindow with keybd_event + AttachThreadInput
  to bypass Windows foreground lock. Preserves maximized window state (IsIconic check).
- desktop_revoke_approvals: clear shell auto-approve and deny pending approvals
- Shell approval requests now bring Adom Desktop to foreground (not just taskbar flash)
- Toast notification click brings app window to foreground via -ToastActivated handler
- Path normalization: all bridge responses use forward slashes via normalize_paths_in_json()

KiCad:

- kicad_screenshot_all: screenshot every KiCad window in one call
- kicad_send_key: send keystrokes to KiCad windows (enter/escape/tab/etc)
- kicad_click: click at coordinates (relative 0-1 or pixel), aligned with screenshots
- kicad_close: force arg for immediate taskkill fallback
- kicad_install_symbol/footprint: quietInstall param to skip editor open

commit.message:
feat: MM方向过滤 — 只买入与Chainlink趋势一致的一侧, 不逆势做市

根因: MM双边做市在5分钟合约中总是买到被抛售的那一侧(跌势买UP/涨势买DOWN), 导致持续亏损

修复:
- 计算 direction_pct = (current_price - strike_price) / strike_price
- BTC涨(>+0.05%): 只买UP | BTC跌(<-0.05%): 只买DOWN | 横盘: 两侧都买
- 单侧模式: buy_size_usd直接用于方向一致的那侧
- 双侧模式: 保留份额等额pairs计算

审查闭环: code-reviewer → 1个sizing bug → 已修复 → 编译+测试通过

commit.message:
feat(awareness): complete Phase 6 - Accessibility, Walking, Visualization, Stats

Phase 6 adds physical-world awareness features:

Accessibility:
- MTA Equipment API polling every 5 min for elevator/escalator outages
- Equipment status types and station summaries
- Accessible mode in transfer engine (weights broken-elevator stations as Infinity)
- Equipment banners on station screens
- useEquipment hook for consuming equipment data

Walking:
- Haversine distance calculations from GTFS coordinates
- Walking time estimates (4.5 km/h average)
- Walking comparison component for short trips
- "Should I just walk?" surfaces when walking is faster or during delays

Visualization:
- Live train position diagram (SVG schematic)
- Train dots interpolated between stations
- Tap train dot to see trip details (TrackTrip integration)
- System health dashboard with all-line status
- useSystemHealth hook for aggregating alerts into per-line health

Stats:
- "Your Subway Year" annual summary component
- Shareable cards via html2canvas + Web Share API
- OMNY fare cap tracking (auto-logged from commute journal)
- Trip counts, distance, carbon saved, most-used stations/lines
- Time window filtering (month/quarter/year/all)

Acceptance criteria met:
- Elevator/escalator outages displayed
- Accessible rerouting avoids broken stations
- Walking comparison for short trips
- OMNY fare cap tracker counting rides
- Live train position diagram rendering
- System health dashboard showing all-line status
- Annual summary generating shareable cards

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(portal): standardized audit JSON report + download button

New auditJson.ts module:
- Generates a complete, standardized JSON report from prospect + audit data
- Structure: prospect info, 6 scores, 5 Core Web Vitals, 12 technical checks,
  SSL + security headers, carbon footprint, code quality (W3C + Yellow Lab),
  design & UX analysis, 4 screenshot URLs, social presence, emails,
  failed audits by category, heaviest resources, auto-generated problems
  list (sorted by severity), sales arguments, recommendations
- Problems auto-generated from technical checks with business impact text
- Recommendations auto-generated based on detected issues
- Sales arguments ready to use in prospection calls

New API route: GET /sessions/[id]/prospects/[pid]/json
- Returns the full audit report as JSON

New "Telecharger JSON" button in prospect detail panel
- Visible only after audit is completed
- Downloads as audit_{name}_{date}.json
- This JSON will feed the PowerPoint template

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

[2D_Layout] Java port + DXF output + GUID xdata roundtrip (2D_006/2D_007)

Java port of 6 layout classes (SectionCut, SVGBuilder, DrawingWriter,
GridDerivation, MetadataReader, LayoutConstants) from Python prototypes.
DXF writer with AIA layers, ISO 128 line weights, grid bubbles, and
elevation level markers. BIMGUID xdata embedded on ARC polylines for
roundtrip sync. DXFSyncVerb reads edited DXF, computes position deltas,
writes back to M_BOM_Line. DXF-to-SVG converter. 5/5 witness tests PASS.
Re-seal after trust-boundary file changes across prior sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
perf: reduce GC pressure and unnecessary re-renders in ARProvider

- Replace anchorsSnapshot state (Map copy per frame) with version counter
- Reuse Matrix4 instance in onUpdate callback instead of allocating per call
- Expose anchorsRef directly via context to avoid object allocation
